name: Incubation Mace
description: Notes The description of this item is slightly non-indicative. Rabbits will charge for 2.6 seconds, then fire 4 bursts of shots, before repeating once more. A rabbit fires 8 bursts of 3 shots over its lifetime. The rabbits will visually grow while charging up, and shrink back down when firing.
effects: Charge Duration: 2.6 seconds Rabbits charge and discharge twice
